answer: The metadata extraction success rate canary failed because the md_frontmatter_ingest_v1 pipeline skipped non-index Markdown, so the system used body text instead of YAML frontmatter. The remediation is to enable parsing of YAML frontmatter on non-index Markdown files, and the validation marker is concept-fm-canary-pass.

facts.remediation: enable parsing of YAML frontmatter on non-index Markdown files
facts.root_cause: concept frontmatter parser skipped non-index markdown
